package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_reflection_on_hot_path: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag reflect-based field access in hot loops where typed access is available.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule547PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario547Positive(records []Rule547PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
